title: Aeronama
description: Mod that adds beautiful Minecraft Aeronautics logo and panorama to your Minecraft screen
body:
## General
You are playing modded Minecraft but don't like default Minecraft panorama and logo? This mod adds new ones!
## Showcase
### Logo override:
![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/644350fecb6e02b22b6fb188471c0c78b0d94fc5_0.webp)
---
### First Panorama:
![panorama1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/079a1653ad0c54fad4e0495616faf050f9859da6_0.webp)
---
### Second Panorama:
![panorama 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f3438cac74e5ef316045d3a82ef9ebba553d3be_0.webp)

## You can:
- Change panoramas/logos in-game. 
- Upload your own panorama/logo. 

## Planned features:
- Animated Logo

## What mods and builds did i use in panorama?
**Mods used for terrain:** Terralith, Tectonic, No man's land, Towns and Towers.

**Other mods:** Distant Horizons/Voxy, Better Clouds.
And Aeronautics of course.
##
**Autors of the builds used in the first panorama:** Artmoby | Artmoby7674 (The Air Independant Propultion A1 - "Atlas"), Aurukel (H.M.S. 'Mantlebreaker' Mk.2), Angelica (Thrust Vectoring Jet).

**Autors of the builds used in the second panorama:** Conquintor (NSV Skyliner), Zakviel (MyXa), mefe513 (VK-2 Jet plane), Ughdhdh (SW Hover)
